title: Critical Constraint: HALEU Fuel Supply
description: High-Assay Low-Enriched Uranium (HALEU) is required by most advanced reactors (Oklo, X-energy, Kairos). Centrus Energy (LEU) is the only US commercial HALEU producer. Revenue $449M, net income $78M (profitable). DOE contract extended through June 2026 (~$110M). HALEU market projected to grow from $0.26B to $6.2B by 2030. Analyst consensus: Buy, avg target $265.
